  1. Home

  3. Competition calendar 2026

Competition calendar 2026

Eight competitions across the division, including three franchise competitions hosted by our affiliate clubs. Volunteers can spend points for priority entry and discounts on most meets.

  • Northern Universities Championships

    Hosted by NUPWC, the Northern Universities Championships returns.

    • Entry opens 29 Nov 2025 at 9am and closes 3 Jan at noon
    • Entries from university alumni who graduated in summer 2025 will be accepted
    • Prizes provided by sponsors
    24–25 Jan 2026 Hirst Welfare Centre, Ashington 96 lifters

  • YNE March Open

    Open to all levels of experience and strength, the YNE March Open is a qualifying competition for regional and national championships.

    • Entry opens 10 Jan 2026 at 9am and closes 14 Feb at noon
    • Volunteers may spend points for priority entry and discounts
    7–8 March 2026 Riccall Regen Centre, York 96 lifters

  • NESC Open

    Hosted by the North East Strength Culture Powerlifting Club, the NESC Open returns in 2026 for its third instalment.

    • Entry opens 14 Feb 2026 at 9am and closes 21 Mar at noon
    • Volunteers may spend points for priority entry and discounts

    More information to come.

    11 Apr 2026 North East Strength Culture, Darlington 48 lifters

  • YNE Novice

    Designed for beginners and first-time lifters, this is a chance to compete without the pressure of seasoned athletes.

    • Entry opens 2 May 2026 at 9am and closes 6 Jun at noon
    • Volunteers may spend points for priority entry and discounts

    Entry requirements: two competitions or fewer, in any federation.

    27–28 Jun 2026 Riccall Regen Centre, York 96 lifters

  • Implexus Open

    Hosted by the Implexus Gym Powerlifting Club, the Implexus Open returns in 2026 for its third instalment.

    • Entry opens 30 May 2026 at 9am and closes 5 Jul at noon
    • Volunteers may spend points for priority entry and discounts

    A competition shirt will be available to buy on the day. One-of-a-kind medals and best lifter trophies will be awarded. Sponsors to be announced.

    25–26 Jul 2026 Implexus Gym, Leeds 48 lifters

  • YNE Juniors, Masters & Bench-Only Championships

    Our divisional championship for Sub-Junior, Junior, Masters and bench-only athletes. An opportunity to compete against your peers.

    • Entry opens 18 Jul 2026 at 9am and closes 22 Aug at noon
    • Volunteers may spend points for priority entry and discounts

    More information to come.

    12 Sept 2026 North East Strength Culture, Darlington 64 lifters

  • Parkhead Open

    Hosted by the historic Parkhead & Wansbeck Powersports Club, the Parkhead Open returns for its second instalment in 2026 in its recently upgraded facilities.

    • Entry opens 29 Aug 2026 at 9am and closes 3 Oct at noon
    • Volunteers may spend points for priority entry and discounts
    24 Oct 2026 Hirst Welfare Centre, Ashington 48 lifters

  • YNE Worlds

    Sponsor TBD

    Our divisional championship returns, where one male and one female lifter can compete for the title of YNE Worlds Champion.

    • Entry opens 12 Sept 2026 at 9am and closes 17 Oct at noon
    • Volunteers may spend points for priority entry and discounts
    • Prizes provided by sponsors

    Entry requirements: 70 GLP achieved at or after the Nov Open 2025. Read the qualifying process.

    7–8 Nov 2026 Riccall Regen Centre 96 lifters

© Yorkshire & North East Powerlifting Federation 2026
